content: Team has been doing wonders, thanks for it
Hello, newbie here, do you guys know what Doresain's covenant? And his recommended team (or alternative team)?

Crimson Pulse is a good general use covenant for him. I think April Tribute can also be good. As for teams, a standard easy to use one would be Doresain|Thais|Faint|Aigis. Doresain|Thais|Faint|Horla is also good, and you can consider slotting in Ogier for any of those teams if you want more strength generation, which doresain wants.

Okie, I haven't unlocked the April Tribute let alone Crimson Pulse but I can definitely buy it via Shop, so I'll do that. <:wish:1356084702468899117> 
I'm currently using Helot: Catena|Aigis|Doresain|Caster atm so I'll definitely check on that. Thank you for the advice, <@456226577798135808>! <:rizz2:1356053138133614753> <:rizz2:1356053138133614753>
whats the best way to build jenkin, covenant wise + im seeing that she scales off crit rate, but im seeing a lot of jenkin build more on crit dmg ?
just wondering before i drop a lot on stamps<:wish:1356084702468899117>
she wants to crit consistently, like any dps, but people build her on crit dmg since with relics and her high base crit rate she's very liable to overcapping, esp if you run gb on her
covenant wise it's either scarlet embrace/crimson pulse
i've also seen april tribute runs
and i've been playing around with dreams recently
gb?
giants blade/blade of the titan
oh ok i just wanted to make sure i understood
i abbreviate as gb because i'm used to it but i should probably stop
hahaha
nws nws

ive seen april recced on guides but i see a lot of steppenwolf (ingame on jenkin by support options) so i made a steppenwolf cov then realized i might be building wrong. so if i build crimson pulse it'll be generally better than april?
uhhh
so steppenwolf is for raw base dmg
crimson is if you're plannign to posse and nuke on the same turn
and scarlet is if you're running keyflare support
april is on guildes because it's generally a good crit dps set, but with jenkins in specific who wants to ramp dmg up through brown first, it's not as good
because of the hp threshold management

i'm currently testing/playing around with dreams on her, for the extra brown card because it's silly, but that's generally a set you put on tawil, and it's levelgated (can't get from shop until lv 63)

cool i just unlocked dreams and i saw some ppl running that set too. i figured with april but thanks so much for explaining the usage of the other relics. game is complex and im just now delving further into covenants <:pray:1356053116260454534> i highly appreciate you taking a moment to respond!
no worries!!
